prompt: Reimagine the real-life forest portrait referenced in the first image as a manga-inspired comic book illustration using the second image as the art style. Apply clean, sharp lines and a vibrant color palette with subtle gradients. Enhance the subject’s features with expressive, oversized eyes and flowing hair that interacts with the forest environment. Add comic-style sparkles and motion lines to convey a sense of vitality. Maintain the serene forest backdrop but stylize it with angular, exaggerated foliage and a dreamlike atmosphere.
prompt_refined: Generate a new image: Transform the real-life forest portrait from image 1 into a manga-inspired comic book illustration, applying the art style demonstrated in image 2. The resulting image should feature clean, sharp lines and a vibrant color palette with subtle gradients. Enhance the subject's features with expressive, oversized eyes and dynamic, flowing hair that visually interacts with the surrounding forest environment. Incorporate comic-style sparkles and subtle motion lines around the subject to convey a sense of vitality. Maintain the serene ambiance of the forest backdrop but stylize the foliage with angular, exaggerated shapes, creating a dreamlike atmosphere.
objects: Vibrant color palette with subtle gradients (visual characteristic)
